text:
まぁ、流石にフォースのテクニックは
いいすぎだと思うけど

ちょっとやそっとの火力にも負けない
ような素材が欲しいの！

それに適いそうな素材は、私の聞いた
限りでは、ギルナスって機甲種の
パーツがそうらしいの！

ギルナスの中でも、特に耐火性の高い
パーツを見繕って持って

Okay, so maybe pushing for Force technique
levels is asking for a bit much.

But I still want to get my hands on some
material that can stand almost that much
firepower!

If all the information I've been given is
correct, I think those Gillnas automata might
have just the parts I'm looking for.

So, what I want you to do is find me the most
fireproof parts those Gillnas have and bring
them back to me!
